---
title: Courses
---

This page is under construction.

## Programming
- [Bash Essentials](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/)
- Python Programming
- Data Management with SQL
- Modeling Data in R

## MRI Analysis
- [Anatomic data](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-mri_anat/)
- Functional preprocessing
- Functional modeling
- Diffusion data
